description: Add mercy rule to dice rolling: after 5 consecutive non-entry rolls when a player needs to enter the board, force the 6th roll to be 4 or 8.
steps: Add consecutiveNonEntryRolls tracking per player in GameController
Add mercy rule logic: when all pawns are at start and 5 consecutive non-entry rolls have occurred, force next roll to be 4 or 8
Add forceEntryRoll method to Dice class to produce a forced 4 or 8 result with correct shell patterns
Reset counter when entry value is rolled or player no longer needs entry
Only activate mercy rule when player has NO pawns on board (all at start or home)
Add unit tests for mercy rule behavior
acceptance_criteria: After 5 consecutive non-entry rolls (1, 2, 3) when player needs entry, 6th roll is guaranteed 4 or 8
Counter resets when an entry value is finally rolled
Mercy rule only activates when player has all pawns at start (none on board)
Mercy rule applies equally to human and AI players
Shell animation shows correct pattern (all up for 4, all down for 8)
All existing tests continue to pass
New tests verify mercy rule behavior
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter test
Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter analyze
